 {"id":"beads_rust-epq","title":"Comprehensive Test Requirements Specification","description":"# Comprehensive Test Requirements Specification

## Purpose
This bead specifies the exact test requirements for every module and command in br. It ensures comprehensive test coverage with detailed logging for debugging test failures.

## Testing Philosophy

1. **Every public function must have tests** - No exceptions
2. **Tests must have detailed logging** - When a test fails, the logs should explain why
3. **Error paths are as important as happy paths** - Test all error conditions
4. **Edge cases must be covered** - Empty inputs, boundary values, unicode, etc.
5. **Tests should be deterministic** - No flaky tests allowed

## Test Categories

### A. Unit Tests (per module)

#### A.1 Storage Module Tests (`src/storage/`)

**sqlite.rs - 35+ tests required**
```rust
// Connection management
test_open_creates_database
test_open_memory_works
test_open_nonexistent_parent_fails
test_pragmas_are_set_correctly
test_journal_mode_is_wal
test_foreign_keys_enabled

// Issue CRUD
test_create_issue_basic
test_create_issue_with_all_fields
test_create_duplicate_id_fails
test_get_issue_exists
test_get_issue_not_found_returns_none
test_update_issue_basic
test_update_issue_not_found_fails
test_delete_issue_basic
test_delete_issue_with_dependents_fails

// Listing/Search
test_list_issues_empty
test_list_issues_returns_all
test_list_issues_filter_by_status
test_list_issues_filter_by_type
test_list_issues_filter_by_priority
test_list_issues_filter_by_assignee
test_list_issues_filter_by_labels
test_list_issues_sort_by_priority
test_list_issues_sort_by_updated
test_list_issues_limit

// Ready/Blocked
test_get_ready_issues_empty
test_get_ready_issues_all_ready
test_get_ready_issues_excludes_blocked
test_get_ready_issues_excludes_closed
test_get_ready_issues_excludes_in_progress
test_get_ready_issues_respects_defer_until
test_get_blocked_issues_empty
test_get_blocked_issues_with_blockers

// Blocked cache
test_rebuild_blocked_cache_empty
test_rebuild_blocked_cache_with_deps
test_cache_invalidation_on_dep_add
test_cache_invalidation_on_dep_remove
test_cache_invalidation_on_status_change

// Transaction discipline
test_create_writes_event
test_update_writes_event
test_create_marks_dirty
test_transaction_rollback_on_error
```

#### A.2 Model Module Tests (`src/model/`)

**issue.rs - 15+ tests required**
```rust
test_issue_new_default_values
test_issue_validate_title_required
test_issue_validate_title_max_length
test_issue_serialize_json
test_issue_deserialize_json
test_issue_serialize_preserves_optional_fields
test_issue_content_hash_deterministic
test_issue_content_hash_changes_on_update
```

**types.rs - 20+ tests required**
```rust
test_status_from_str_open
test_status_from_str_in_progress
test_status_from_str_closed
test_status_from_str_invalid
test_status_display
test_issue_type_from_str_all_variants
test_issue_type_display
test_priority_from_int_valid
test_priority_from_int_invalid
test_priority_from_str_p_prefix
test_priority_display
```

#### A.3 Error Module Tests (`src/error/`)

**mod.rs - 20+ tests required**
```rust
test_error_display_database_not_found
test_error_display_issue_not_found
test_error_display_ambiguous_id
test_error_display_validation
test_error_display_cycle_detected
test_error_suggestion_not_initialized
test_error_suggestion_issue_not_found
test_error_is_user_recoverable
test_error_exit_code_always_one
test_error_json_serialization
test_error_from_rusqlite
test_error_from_io
test_error_from_serde
test_error_with_context
```

#### A.4 Sync Module Tests (`src/sync/`)

**export.rs - 20+ tests required**
```rust
test_export_empty_database
test_export_single_issue
test_export_multiple_issues
test_export_with_dependencies
test_export_with_labels
test_export_with_comments
test_export_jsonl_format_correct
test_export_ordering_deterministic
test_export_metadata_file
test_export_incremental_dirty_only
test_export_handles_unicode
test_export_handles_special_chars
test_export_large_description
```

**import.rs - 20+ tests required**
```rust
test_import_empty_file
test_import_single_issue
test_import_multiple_issues
test_import_with_dependencies
test_import_updates_existing
test_import_conflict_same_hash_skips
test_import_conflict_different_hash_warns
test_import_invalid_json_fails
test_import_missing_required_field_fails
test_import_prefix_mismatch_warns
test_import_preserves_timestamps
test_import_transaction_atomic
```

#### A.5 CLI Module Tests (`src/cli/`)

**args.rs - 10+ tests required per command**
```rust
// For EACH command (create, list, show, update, close, etc.):
test_<cmd>_parse_minimal_args
test_<cmd>_parse_all_args
test_<cmd>_parse_invalid_arg_fails
test_<cmd>_default_values
test_<cmd>_help_text
```

### B. Integration Tests (`tests/integration/`)

**Minimum 50 integration tests across:**

**B.1 Command Tests**
- Every command must have at least 5 integration tests
- Tests must verify exit codes, stdout, stderr
- Tests must verify file system state

**B.2 Workflow Tests**
```rust
test_complete_issue_lifecycle
test_dependency_workflow
test_bulk_close_workflow
test_sync_roundtrip
test_search_workflow
test_label_management_workflow
test_comment_workflow
test_priority_sorting_workflow
```

**B.3 Error Recovery Tests**
```rust
test_graceful_handling_corrupt_db
test_graceful_handling_missing_jsonl
test_graceful_handling_permission_denied
test_concurrent_access_safety
```

### C. Snapshot Tests (`tests/snapshots/`)

**C.1 CLI Output Snapshots**
- Every command's human-readable output
- Every command's JSON output
- Help text for main command and all subcommands

**C.2 Error Message Snapshots**
- Every error type's user-facing message
- Error suggestions

**C.3 Format Snapshots**
- JSONL export format for issues
- JSONL export format for dependencies
- metadata.json format

### D. Conformance Tests (`tests/conformance/`)

**D.1 Create Command Conformance**
```rust
conformance_create_basic
conformance_create_with_type
conformance_create_with_priority
conformance_create_with_assignee
conformance_create_with_labels
conformance_create_with_deps
```

**D.2 Query Command Conformance**
```rust
conformance_list_all
conformance_list_by_status
conformance_list_by_type
conformance_show_basic
conformance_ready_basic
conformance_blocked_basic
```

**D.3 Update Command Conformance**
```rust
conformance_update_status
conformance_update_priority
conformance_close_basic
conformance_reopen_basic
```

**D.4 Sync Conformance**
```rust
conformance_sync_roundtrip
conformance_sync_export_format
conformance_sync_import_merge
```

### E. Benchmark Tests (`benches/`)

**E.1 Storage Benchmarks**
```rust
benchmark_create_issue_single
benchmark_create_issue_batch_100
benchmark_create_issue_batch_1000
benchmark_list_issues_100
benchmark_list_issues_1000
benchmark_list_issues_10000
benchmark_ready_query_1k_issues_2k_deps
benchmark_ready_query_10k_issues_20k_deps
```

**E.2 Sync Benchmarks**
```rust
benchmark_export_1000_issues
benchmark_export_10000_issues
benchmark_import_1000_issues
benchmark_import_10000_issues
```

## Test Logging Requirements

Every test MUST use structured logging:

```rust
#[test]
fn test_example() {
    init_test_logging();  // REQUIRED
    info!("Starting test_example");

    // Log setup
    debug!(param = ?value, "Setting up test data");

    // Log action
    info!(action = "create_issue", id = %issue.id, "Performing action");

    // Log verification
    debug!(expected = ?expected, actual = ?actual, "Verifying result");

    // Assertions with context
    assert_eq!(actual, expected, "Issue count mismatch after operation");

    info!("test_example completed successfully");
}
```

## Coverage Requirements

| Module | Minimum Line Coverage | Minimum Branch Coverage |
|--------|----------------------|------------------------|
| storage/ | 90% | 85% |
| model/ | 95% | 90% |
| error/ | 80% | 75% |
| cli/commands/ | 85% | 80% |
| sync/ | 90% | 85% |
| Overall | 85% | 80% |

## Test Execution

```bash
# Run all tests with logging
RUST_LOG=debug cargo test -- --nocapture

# Run specific module tests
cargo test storage -- --nocapture
cargo test cli::commands::create -- --nocapture

# Run with coverage
cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace --html

# Run benchmarks
cargo bench --bench storage_perf

# Run conformance tests (requires bd)
cargo test conformance -- --nocapture
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 200+ unit tests across all modules
- [ ] 50+ integration tests
- [ ] 30+ snapshot tests
- [ ] 20+ conformance tests
- [ ] All tests use structured logging
- [ ] 85%+ line coverage overall
- [ ] No flaky tests (all tests pass 100/100 runs)
- [ ] Test execution < 60 seconds (excluding benchmarks)
- [ ] CI runs all tests on every PR

## Dependencies
- Requires Unit Test Infrastructure (4n9)
- Requires Integration Test Suite (ncc)
- Requires Snapshot Testing (38e)
- Requires Conformance Tests (pfx)
- All Phase 1-4 beads must be complete

## Rationale
Comprehensive test coverage is non-negotiable for a tool that manages critical project data. The test requirements ensure nothing slips through the cracks. Detailed logging in tests makes debugging failures fast - when CI fails, you can read the logs instead of reproducing locally. This specification serves as the quality gate checklist before release.

 {"id":"beads_rust-f8e","title":"--no-db mode (JSONL-only operation)","description":"# --no-db Mode (JSONL-only operation)

## Purpose
Support classic `--no-db` mode: operate on JSONL without SQLite. This is required for environments where DB is unavailable or undesired.

## Behavior
- Use in-memory storage populated from JSONL.
- Locate JSONL via `BEADS_DIR` / `.beads/issues.jsonl` discovery rules.
- Prefix detection order:
  1) `issue-prefix` in config.yaml
  2) common prefix across JSONL IDs
  3) directory name fallback
- Mixed prefixes => error (must set explicit config).
- At command exit, **write JSONL atomically** (issues only; no ephemerals/wisps).

## Constraints
- No daemon, no SQLite-only features.
- Some commands may be limited (e.g., stats that require SQL aggregates).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Commands operate read/write against JSONL only.
- Atomic write on exit with correct filtering.
- Prefix detection/validation matches bd.

## Tests
- No-db mode read/write with JSONL fixture.
- Mixed prefix error path.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"OpusForge","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:18:01.415593364Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T06:13:54.841008848Z"}
 {"id":"beads_rust-fmxd","title":"E2E tests: defer/undefer commands","description":"# E2E Tests for \`defer\` and \`undefer\` Commands

## Overview
The defer/undefer commands manage issue scheduling by setting/clearing \`status=deferred\` and \`defer_until\` timestamp.

## Commands to Test
- \`br defer <id>\` - Defer issue indefinitely
- \`br defer <id> --until <time>\` - Defer until specific time
- \`br defer <id1> <id2>\` - Defer multiple issues
- \`br undefer <id>\` - Undefer (set status=open)
- \`br undefer <id1> <id2>\` - Undefer multiple

## Test Cases

### Defer Basic (5 tests)
1. **defer_sets_status_deferred** - Status changes to deferred
2. **defer_indefinitely_no_until** - No defer_until when no --until
3. **defer_with_until_timestamp** - defer_until set correctly
4. **defer_multiple_issues** - All issues deferred
5. **defer_json_output** - JSON shows updated issue

### Natural Time Parsing (6 tests)
6. **defer_until_tomorrow** - \`--until tomorrow\` works
7. **defer_until_relative** - \`--until +1h\` works
8. **defer_until_specific_date** - \`--until 2026-02-01\` works
9. **defer_until_datetime** - \`--until "2026-02-01 09:00"\` works
10. **defer_until_past_warning** - Past date warns but allows
11. **defer_until_invalid_error** - Invalid time format errors

### Undefer (4 tests)
12. **undefer_sets_status_open** - Status changes to open
13. **undefer_clears_defer_until** - defer_until becomes null
14. **undefer_multiple_issues** - All issues undeferred
15. **undefer_json_output** - JSON shows updated issue

### Edge Cases (4 tests)
16. **defer_already_deferred** - Idempotent, updates defer_until
17. **undefer_already_open** - No-op, no error
18. **defer_closed_issue_error** - Cannot defer closed issue
19. **defer_nonexistent_error** - Unknown ID errors

### Ready/Blocked Interaction (3 tests)
20. **deferred_not_in_ready** - Deferred issues excluded from ready
21. **deferred_not_blocked** - Deferred != blocked
22. **undefer_appears_in_ready** - Undeferred issue shows in ready

## Logging Requirements
- Log each defer/undefer action
- Log time parsing results
- Log status transitions
- Log any validation errors

## Test File Structure
\`\`\`
tests/e2e_defer.rs
├── mod defer_basic_tests (5)
├── mod defer_time_parsing_tests (6)
├── mod undefer_tests (4)
├── mod defer_edge_cases (4)
└── mod defer_ready_interaction (3)
\`\`\`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file: tests/e2e_defer.rs
- [ ] 22 test functions minimum
- [ ] Natural time parsing coverage
- [ ] ready/blocked interaction verified","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"OpusArchitect","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:19:08.288701602-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T11:42:32.484640821-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"beads_rust-fmxd","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-oxmd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:19:16.250705997-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-g3i","title":"Phase 1: Foundation - Project Setup & Core Types","description":"# Phase 1: Foundation

## Goals
Establish scaffolding, core types, schema, and storage primitives needed for all commands.

## Deliverables
- Project scaffolding (`Cargo.toml`, toolchain, layout) with YAML config deps.
- Model types (Issue/Dependency/Comment/Event) matching classic JSON shape.
- ID generation + content hashing (base36 adaptive, child counters).
- SQLite schema compatibility + migrations.
- Storage core with transaction discipline and dirty/event hooks.
- Error handling + output conventions.

## Dependencies
- Must complete before Phase 2 (core commands).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Schema matches bd (PRAGMA table_info/indexes).
- Unit tests for model validation + hashing.
- Storage CRUD works in memory + file DB.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T06:10:50.667984683Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T08:57:02.794628193Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T08:57:02.794628193Z","close_reason":"Completed Phase 1: Foundation (scaffolding, models, storage, schema, logging, tests)"}
